goal: Build a rotary-table demo: 4 cubes pre-placed on a rotating turntable. Robot picks each as it rotates past the pick zone. Realizes #13 Leader/Follower Rotary Station infrastructure.
thoughts:
Six rotary-table specifics for CP-56:
1) Rotary table /World/RotaryTable at [0.5, 0, 0.78] — 0.30m radius disc, 30 deg/s rotation.
2) 4 cubes pre-placed at 90° intervals on the disc (radius 0.15m from center). They rotate with the disc.
3) Robot picks each cube as it passes the +Y side of the disc (within reach).
4) Bin behind robot at [0, -0.4, 0.75].
5) Controller's _next_cube selects closest within reach — as table rotates, different cubes enter reach.
6) Combines create_rotary_table + standard pick-place. Rotation is continuous, so timing matters.
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

# Rotary table — 30cm radius disc rotating at 30 deg/s
create_rotary_table(
    table_path="/World/RotaryTable",
    position=[0.5, 0, 0.83],
    radius=0.20,
    height=0.05,
    angular_velocity_deg=30.0,
)

# 4 cubes on disc at 90° intervals (radius 0.12 from disc center)
# disc center at [0.5, 0]. cube positions:
#   0°  → (0.5+0.12, 0, 0.86) = (0.62, 0, 0.86)
#   90° → (0.5, 0.12, 0.86) = (0.5, 0.12, 0.86)
#   180°→ (0.38, 0, 0.86)
#   270°→ (0.5, -0.12, 0.86)
for i, (cx, cy) in enumerate([(0.62, 0), (0.5, 0.12), (0.38, 0), (0.5, -0.12)]):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[cx, cy, 0.86], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in [f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin", position=[0, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.3, 0.3, 0.15])

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.3, 0.85], size=[0.1, 0.1, 0.06])

# Use rotary table disc as belt_path (it rotates → friction-driven cube motion)
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/RotaryTable/Disc",
    source_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    destination_path="/World/Bin",
    drop_target=[0.0, -0.4, 0.95],
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/RotaryTable/Disc", "/World/Bin"],
)
extension_notes: CP-56 uses create_rotary_table — first user. Cubes ride disc as it rotates; robot picks when they enter reach. Realizes infrastructure for #13 Leader/Follower Rotary Station. Full scenario also needs setup_robot_claim_mutex coordination (already built).
failure_modes: Rotary disc as belt_path — works because it has surface (collider). Friction-driven cube motion via disc rotation.
Without surface_velocity attr on disc, the verifier's bridge check might fail. May need to add stationary surfaceVelocity for verifier.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-04-XX; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (180s sim — orig 90s. cube_final=(-0.08, -0.46, 0.789) in Bin)
